Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's day three of our vacation in Yakushima...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Man, I can't believe it's already the third day of our trip.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}It's too bad we have to go home tomorrow. I'd totally stay longer if I could.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}But I can't complain too much. We went through a hell of a lot here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Yeah, like hearing you and the chairman singing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 21 4 10}I barely got any sleep last night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Do we have a mission at the beach today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Nah, it's nothing like that. We just came here to have some fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Do you understand what it means to have fun, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Yes, I am informed of the concept. Recreation is sustenance for one's mental wellbeing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yeah, exactly! Wow, you sure know a lot about us humans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Alright, let's take one last dip before we leave![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Is it okay for Aigis to go in the water?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It is best that everyone partake in this activity together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Deriving enjoyment alone is not the optimal method to "have fun."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You've got some strong feelings on pretty weird things, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But what the heck, might as well![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Quite a lot's happened during our time here, but it looks like we'll get to relax a bit today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Sanada-san! What're you doin'!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Hahaha! Glad to see everyone's having so much fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I've already told you what time the ship is arriving tomorrow, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I'll probably head over to the port early, so don't be late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}We can get back to business once we've returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}All right. I guess we should join too, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Aigis, wait! That's not what water gun means![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}All right, here's our chance for an All-Out Attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Wait, time out! I seriously can't take—! Gyaaaaaah![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Seriously guys, it's just a game. Could ya not treat this like a life-or-death battle?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had a fun time with[n]everyone in Yakushima...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With Aigis joining, things[n]are likely to get livelier...[n]{f 1 1}
